title: Oct 16 class recording and work now posted
content: Pls see the bottom of Week 9. Note that I had a typo in the spreadsheet that we worked on in class (in managed to flip the volatilities of A2 and A3). I fixed it in the posted spreadsheet. Sorry about that.
